texto: Never judge yourself by the narrowstandards of others. What we do together here is ourbusiness, nobody else's. Never, never doubt what we havejust done is anything but love. Never let yourself be restrictedby thoughts of what society would have you do, what it wouldaccept or condemn. Please promise me that.
explicacao: Citação de Lynne Connolly sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Never judge yourself by the narrowstandards of others. What we do together here is ourbusiness, n…” articula amor, historical-romance, reflexao em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
